◆ Credit-spread candidates
no vol-rich range-bound F&O names today
Vol-rank (0–100) is where each stock's current 20-day realised volatility sits within its own ~1-year history. High rank = premium is relatively rich, which favours selling credit spreads; low rank favours buying calls/puts. It is a realised-vol proxy standing in for true option IV-rank — the honest upgrade is to store daily option-chain IV and rank against that once a few months of history accumulate. Credit-spread candidates shown here are F&O names with vol-rank ≥ 70, a WATCH signal, and RSI 40–60 (range-bound); lean is bull-put above the 15-day SMA, bear-call below.
